transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, I'm Priya from Supreme Petrochemicals. Is this a good time?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Yes, Anita here, procurement at Aqua Treat. We do water treatment chemicals

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. Which chemicals are you sourcing now?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Hydrochloric acid, caustic soda, alum. Volumes are 20 tonnes a month combined

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Any issues with your current supplier?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Pricing has gone up 15% this year. We have RFQs going out next month

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We can include you in that RFQ. Email and best contact time?
